g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the voice input pipeline for the G1 humanoid')
sendPrompt('What text input modalities does the humanoid NLP system handle?')
sendPrompt('How does sensor fusion feed into the NLP module?')
sendPrompt('What system events feed the NLP module as triggers?')
sendPrompt('Explain the ASR pipeline: Whisper VAD and multilingual support for Indian languages')
sendPrompt('What is language identification and why does it matter for this project?')
sendPrompt('How does context injection work — what sensor and environment data gets added to NLP input?')
sendPrompt('Explain intent classification for the humanoid assistant — what intents do we need to handle?')
sendPrompt('What entities does the NLP module need to extract for the humanoid office assistant?')
sendPrompt('How does sentiment and affect detection improve humanoid interaction quality?')
sendPrompt('How does the NLP module handle ambiguous or unclear user requests?')
sendPrompt('What does the dialogue manager do and how does it orchestrate the conversation state machine?')
sendPrompt('Explain the RAG pipeline for the humanoid assistant — what knowledge sources are indexed?')
sendPrompt('How does LLM tool-calling work for calendar, weather, and VMS integration?')
sendPrompt('What TTS engine should we use for the G1 humanoid — ElevenLabs vs Google TTS vs Coqui?')
sendPrompt('How does response generation work — what templates and LLM prompting strategy should we use?')
sendPrompt('How does the NLP system communicate robot actions to the robotics team API?')
sendPrompt('Design the session memory and context store for multi-turn conversations with the humanoid')
sendPrompt('What analytics and governance logging should the NLP module emit?')
sendPrompt('What external APIs does the NLP module need to integrate — calendar, VMS, weather?')
sendPrompt('How do we build a continuous improvement loop for the humanoid NLP system?')
sendPrompt('What evaluation metrics should we track for the NLP module — WER, intent accuracy, BLEU?')
